title: MuslinZ 3PK Baby Muslin Squares, Burp Cloths, Newborn Essentials, Soft Bamboo/Organic Cotton 70 x 70cm (Grey Cloud)
features: MuslinZ brand pack of 3 luxurious quality muslin squares
Made from 70% Bamboo and 30% Organic Cotton, excellent quality, more absorbent and wonderfully soft on delicate skin. Machine washable at 30c - the more you wash the softer they get.
Use for swaddling a newborn, burping, lightweight baby blanket, shielding when breastfeeding, crib sheet, changing mat cover, shade, play mat, bath towel etc.
Exclusive print designed in UK manufactured by MuslinZ in Oeko-Tex and ISO certified factory. MuslinZ is a registered brand
description: Product Description Our Classic Muslin Square MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: MuslinZ Leopard Sensory Muslin Swaddles Essential for all parents and their babies. Now, in addition to all these uses, the multi-functional sensory range can be used as a stimulating visual aid. Used as playmat cover for tummy time, drape over a cot or pram side or hang in babies view. It will engage, entertain and help baby in their visual development and still be able to mop up that little dribble! Machine Washable 40c - Wash before use. Made from 70% Bamboo / 30% Organic Cotton Luxuriously soft sensory swaddles with the qualities of Bamboo and the added strength of Organic Cotton MuslinZ sensory muslin swaddles can be used as burp cloth, general mopping up cloth and a baby comforter 120cm x 120cm sizing - Perfect for use as a cloth nappy for newborn babies, for shielding when breastfeeding, burping and mopping up cloth or as a lightweight baby blanket MuslinZ Leopard Sensory Muslin Swaddle Designed in the UK At MuslinZ we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality so we decided to design our own. Our muslin's are well known for good quality in the UK and worldwide. Machine Washable at 40c – prewash on short 30c wash and dry naturally to prepare for use.
